package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_io_operations_small_writes_without_bufio_writer: Layer: I/O operations. Flag many Write calls to files or network connections without bufio buffering.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule551PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario551Positive(records []Rule551PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
